---
name: "🚀 Feature Request (AI/ML Enhancement)"
about: Propose a new model architecture, agent skill, or pipeline optimization.
title: "[FEAT]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: khang3004
---

### 1. Conceptual Overview
Provide a clear and concise description of the new AI capability or framework component you propose.

### 2. Motivation & Academic Rationale
Why is this feature necessary? (e.g., Does it improve convergence rate? Does it support new NLP structures for your master's research?).

### 3. Proposed Implementation Details
Describe the architectural changes required:
- **Target Module:** (e.g., `edumind/nlp_model_training/models/`)
- **Dependencies:** (Do we need to update `pyproject.toml` via `uv`?)

### 4. Definition of Done (DoD)
- [ ] Unit tests implemented in `tests/`
- [ ] Pytest checks pass via GitHub Actions
- [ ] Documentation updated in Wiki
